name: watercolor
description: Winslow Homer-style loose watercolor washes on cold-press paper.
style_suffix: in the style of a Winslow Homer watercolor, loose transparent washes on cold-press watercolor paper, soft wet-on-wet blooms and visible paper texture, muted palette of slate blue, sienna, olive green, and warm gray, suggestive brushwork with unfinished edges, natural light, no hard outlines, quiet and atmospheric tone
